webauthn_registration_id.description: The unique ID for the Passkey or WebAuthn registration.

domain.description: The `domain` on which Passkey or WebAuthn registration was started. This will be the domain of your app.

user_agent.description: The user agent of the User.

verified.description: The verified boolean denotes whether or not this send method, e.g. phone number, email address, etc., has been successfully authenticated by the User.

authenticator_type.description: The `authenticator_type` string displays the requested authenticator type of the Passkey or WebAuthn device. The two valid types are "platform" and "cross-platform". If no value is present, the Passkey or WebAuthn device was created without an authenticator type preference.

name.description: The `name` of the Passkey or WebAuthn registration.
